ProjectTechnicalDetails.TechnicalDescription: Multi-building residential complex featuring sustainable materials, solar panels, and shared community spaces.

BAS_U.Note: BAS-U must be appointed before construction start — latest by 2025-11-01

AMP.Note: BAS-P has started draft — first review due at startmöte on 2025-06-20

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Roof-mounted solar panel installation — working at height
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: To be defined in AMP during projektering phase

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Multi-building site — risk of contractor overlap and coordination failures
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Coordination plan to be developed with BAS-U before byggskede

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Sustainable/novel materials — unknown handling and installation hazards
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Material safety data sheets to be reviewed by BAS-P during projektering

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Suburban location — ground conditions unknown, potential groundwater risk

SpecialConditions: Ongoing residential area nearby — noise and dust restrictions apply
Geotechnical survey not yet completed — ground risk classification provisional
Solar panel installation requires specialist contractor — procurement not started

PendingActions.Description: Hold startmöte with BAS-P — review AMP draft and project risk assessment
Commission geotechnical survey — confirm ground conditions before projektering
Complete project size/risk classification (Identifiering storlek, kompetens, risknivå)
Define dialogue plan with BAS-P for projektering phase
Begin BAS-U procurement — advertise and evaluate candidates
Review material safety data sheets for sustainable building materials with BAS-P
